ha_device_create.tooltip: Create Home Assistant device object, unique ID is used for discovery and entity ownership

ha_device_set_info.message0: %1 Set device information Name %2 Manufacturer %3 Model %4 Software version %5 Configure URL %6
ha_device_set_info.tooltip: Set the basic information displayed by the HA device in Home Assistant

ha_device_enable_availability.tooltip: Enable device online/offline status, Last Will will report offline when abnormal disconnection

ha_mqtt_create.message0: Create HA MQTT %1 Network client %2 Type %3 Device %4 Maximum number of entities %5
ha_mqtt_create.tooltip: Create HAMqtt objects and automatically maintain connections in the loop; please place before the entity creation block

ha_mqtt_begin.message0: %1 connects to MQTT host %2 port %3 user name %4 password %5
ha_mqtt_begin.tooltip: Set the MQTT server and authentication information, and the library will automatically connect and reconnect in the loop

ha_mqtt_set_prefixes.message0: %1 sets the discovery prefix %2 data prefix %3
ha_mqtt_set_prefixes.tooltip: Set Home Assistant discovery topic prefix and data topic prefix

ha_mqtt_set_keep_alive.tooltip: Set the interval between MQTT KeepAlive, the default is 15 seconds

ha_mqtt_set_buffer_size.tooltip: Set the underlying PubSubClient buffer size. Complex discovery configurations can be appropriately increased.

ha_mqtt_loop.tooltip: Manually call MQTT loop processing; the creation block has been automatically added by default

ha_mqtt_connected.tooltip: Return whether HA MQTT is connected to the server

ha_mqtt_state.tooltip: Returns HAMqtt connection status code, 0 means connected

ha_mqtt_publish.tooltip: Publish custom MQTT message via HAMqtt

ha_mqtt_subscribe.tooltip: Subscribe to the custom MQTT topic, usually called in the connected callback

ha_mqtt_disconnect.tooltip: Disconnect HAMqtt connection and stop automatic reconnection until begin again

ha_mqtt_on_connected.tooltip: Register MQTT connection success callback, suitable for subscribing to custom topics after reconnection

ha_mqtt_on_message.message0: When %1 receives the custom MQTT message
ha_mqtt_on_message.tooltip: Register a custom MQTT message callback; the subject, content and length can be read in corresponding value blocks

ha_mqtt_message_topic.tooltip: Read the topic in the current MQTT message callback

ha_mqtt_message_payload.tooltip: Read the content text in the current MQTT message callback

ha_mqtt_message_length.tooltip: Read the content byte length in the current MQTT message callback

ha_entity_set_info.message0: %1 Set entity name %2 Object ID %3 Icon %4
ha_entity_set_info.tooltip: Set the display name of the HA entity, the object ID and the Material Design icon

ha_entity_set_availability.tooltip: Report entity online or offline status

ha_sensor_create_text.message0: Create HA text sensor %1 unique ID %2 function %3
ha_sensor_create_text.tooltip: Create Home Assistant sensor for reporting text status

ha_sensor_create_number.message0: Create HA value sensor %1 Unique ID %2 Accuracy %3 Function %4
ha_sensor_create_number.tooltip: Create Home Assistant sensor for reporting digital status

ha_sensor_settings.message0: %1 Set Sensor Category %2 Status Category %3 Unit %4 Expires %5 seconds Force update %6
ha_sensor_settings.tooltip: Configure sensor device category, status category, units, expiration time, and forced updates

ha_sensor_set_value.tooltip: Report text sensor value to Home Assistant

ha_sensor_set_json_attributes.tooltip: Publish attribute JSON for sensors with JSON attribute functionality enabled

ha_sensor_number_set_value.tooltip: Report numerical sensor value to Home Assistant

ha_binary_sensor_create.message0: Create HA binary sensor %1 unique ID %2
ha_binary_sensor_create.tooltip: Create Home Assistant binary sensor that reports on/off status

ha_binary_sensor_settings.message0: %1 Set binary sensor category %2 Expires %3 seconds
ha_binary_sensor_settings.tooltip: Configure binary sensor category and status expiration time

ha_binary_sensor_get_state.tooltip: Read the current status of the binary sensor

ha_switch_create.tooltip: Create a switch entity controllable from Home Assistant

ha_switch_settings.message0: %1 Setting switch Category %2 Reserved command %3 Optimistic mode %4
ha_switch_settings.tooltip: Configuring switch classes, command retention, and optimistic mode

ha_switch_set_state.tooltip: Report the switch status to Home Assistant

ha_switch_get_state.tooltip: Read the current status of the switch

ha_switch_on_command.tooltip: Process the switch command issued by Home Assistant, and use "Command Boolean Status" to read the target status

ha_button_create.tooltip: Create Home Assistant panel button entity

ha_button_settings.tooltip: Configure button categories and command retention

ha_button_on_command.tooltip: Handle Home Assistant button click command

ha_light_create.message0: create HA light %1 unique ID %2 function %3
ha_light_create.tooltip: Create Home Assistant light entity and select brightness, color temperature and RGB functions

ha_light_settings.message0: %1 Set light Reserved command %2 Optimistic mode %3 Brightness range %4 Minimum color temperature %5 Maximum color temperature %6
ha_light_settings.tooltip: Configure the light's command hold, optimistic mode, brightness range, and color temperature range

ha_light_set_brightness.tooltip: Report light brightness, the range is determined by the brightness range configuration

ha_light_set_color_temperature.tooltip: Report lamp color temperature, unit is mired

ha_light_set_rgb.message0: %1 reports RGB red %2 green %3 blue %4 mandatory %5
ha_light_set_rgb.tooltip: Report light RGB color, three channel range 0-255

ha_light_get_state.tooltip: Read the current switch status of the light

ha_light_get_brightness.tooltip: Read the current brightness of the light

ha_light_on_state_command.message0: When %1 receives the light switch command
ha_light_on_state_command.tooltip: To handle light switch commands, the target state can be read using the command boolean status value block

ha_light_on_brightness_command.tooltip: To process the lamp brightness command, the target brightness can be read using the command brightness value block.

ha_light_on_color_temperature_command.message0: When %1 receives the color temperature command
ha_light_on_color_temperature_command.tooltip: To process the lamp color temperature command, the target color temperature can be read using the command color temperature value block.

ha_light_on_rgb_command.tooltip: To process the light RGB command, you can use the command RGB value block to read the target color

ha_number_create.message0: Create HA numeric control %1 unique ID %2 precision %3
ha_number_create.tooltip: Create Home Assistant numeric input/slider entity

ha_number_settings.message0: %1 Set Number Category %2 Unit %3 Mode %4 Minimum %5 Maximum %6 Step Size %7 Reserved %8 Optimistic %9
ha_number_settings.tooltip: Configure the category, unit, display mode, range, step size, and command behavior of digital entities

ha_number_set_state.tooltip: Report the current value of a digital entity

ha_number_get_state.tooltip: Read the current value of a digital entity

ha_number_on_command.tooltip: Process the Home Assistant numeric change command, and the numeric command value block can be used to read the target value

ha_select_create.message0: Create HA drop-down selection %1 unique ID %2
ha_select_create.tooltip: Create Home Assistant drop-down selection entity

ha_select_settings.tooltip: Configure drop-down selection options. Multiple options are separated by English semicolons.

ha_select_set_state.tooltip: Report the current selection by option index, -1 means no selection

ha_select_get_option.tooltip: Read the currently selected option text

ha_select_on_command.tooltip: Process the Home Assistant drop-down selection command, and you can use the selection command index value block to read the target option

ha_command_bool_state.tooltip: Read the target boolean state in a switch or light switch command

ha_command_brightness.tooltip: Read the target brightness in the lamp brightness command

ha_command_color_temperature.tooltip: Read the target color temperature in the lamp color temperature command

ha_command_rgb_red.tooltip: Read the red channel in the light RGB command

ha_command_rgb_green.tooltip: Read the green channel in the light RGB command

ha_command_rgb_blue.tooltip: Read the blue channel in the light RGB command

ha_number_command_is_set.tooltip: Whether the read digital command carries a valid value, the reset command will return no

ha_number_command_value.tooltip: Read the target value in a numeric command

ha_select_command_index.tooltip: Read target option index in drop-down selection command
